intentSynonyms: query a freebusy in google calendar
query free/busy information for calendars in gcal
description: Query free/busy information for one or more calendars within a time range. Returns time slots where events are scheduled. Useful for finding available meeting times.

time_min.description: Start of the time range as ISO 8601 timestamp

time_max.description: End of the time range as ISO 8601 timestamp

time_zone.description: IANA time zone for the query
